languages.text: "Вы делаете хуже. Отойдите и не сбивайте навигационную систему священной машины".
"You are making it worse. Stand aside and do not tamper with the sacred machine's navigation system."
languages.original_text: "Вы делаете хуже. Отойдите и не сбивайте навигационную систему священной машины".

traits.locale_text: "You are making it worse. Stand aside and do not tamper with the sacred machine's navigation system."
"You are making it worse. Stand aside and do not tamper with the sacred machine's navigation system."
"You are making it worse. Stand aside and do not tamper with the sacred machine's navigation system."

languages.text: “你这是在添乱。站一边去，别再碰这台神圣机械的导航系统。”
languages.original_text: "You are making it worse. Stand aside and do not tamper with the sacred machine's navigation system."

traits.locale_text: “你这是在添乱。站一边去，别再碰这台神圣机械的导航系统。”

languages.text: « Vous ne faites qu'empirer les choses. Restez à l'écart et abstenez-vous de toucher au système de navigation de la machine sacrée. »
languages.original_text: "You are making it worse. Stand aside and do not tamper with the sacred machine's navigation system."

traits.locale_text: « Vous ne faites qu'empirer les choses. Restez à l'écart et abstenez-vous de toucher au système de navigation de la machine sacrée. »

languages.text: "Durumu daha da kötüleştiriyorsunuz. Kenara çekilin, kutsal makinenin gezinme sistemini kurcalamayın."
languages.original_text: "You are making it worse. Stand aside and do not tamper with the sacred machine's navigation system."

traits.locale_text: "Durumu daha da kötüleştiriyorsunuz. Kenara çekilin, kutsal makinenin gezinme sistemini kurcalamayın."

languages.text: «Lo está empeorando. Apártese y no toque el sistema de navegación de la sagrada máquina».
languages.original_text: "You are making it worse. Stand aside and do not tamper with the sacred machine's navigation system."

traits.locale_text: «Lo está empeorando. Apártese y no toque el sistema de navegación de la sagrada máquina».

languages.text: "Ihr macht es nur schlimmer. Tretet zur Seite und spielt nicht am Navigationssystem der heiligen Maschine herum."
languages.original_text: "You are making it worse. Stand aside and do not tamper with the sacred machine's navigation system."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr macht es nur schlimmer. Tretet zur Seite und spielt nicht am Navigationssystem der heiligen Maschine herum."

languages.text: 「悪化させている。聖なる機械のナビゲーションシステムを弄るな。」
languages.original_text: "You are making it worse. Stand aside and do not tamper with the sacred machine's navigation system."

traits.locale_text: 「悪化させている。聖なる機械のナビゲーションシステムを弄るな。」
